arts.ttl: Crystal Palace duo donate towards Holmesdale Fanatics Wembley display for FA Cup semi-final
arts.sum: “The money raised by this group will be used by the Holmesdale Fanatics to fund display materials for the FA Cup semi final against Aston Villa. Crystal Palace players Chris Richards and Dean Henderson have both donated to the planned Holmesdale Fanatics fan display for their FA Cup semi-final against Aston Villa.
